sections.paragraph:
Original: טלמון

Transliteration: ṭalmôn

Phonetic: tal-mone'

BDB Definition:

Talmon = "oppressor"
  1. the head of a family of doorkeepers in the temple; some of his descendants returned from exile with Zerubbabel and were employed in their hereditary office in the days of Nehemiah and Ezra
    1. possibly two other doorkeepers in the time of Nehemiah

Origin: from the same as H2728

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
